description: On the ground, engineers must test the aircraft's pressurization system to ensure it can hold pressure and has no leaks.

nodes.task_description: Seal the aircraft and connect ground-based air carts to the pressurization system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures the aircraft is ready for the test.

nodes.task_description: Slowly increase the pressure inside the cabin to simulate the pressure differential at high altitude.

expected_outcome.value: Agent operates the system to pressurize the cabin to the target PSI.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the pressure decay rate to ensure it is within the allowable limits, which indicates there are no significant leaks.

expected_outcome.value: Agent monitors the pressure and confirms the leak rate is acceptable.
